name: SAM Registry Hive Dump via Reg Utility
description: Handle to SAM registry hive via `reg.exe` utility is detected. This is a highly suspicious activity as the SAM hive contains local user password hashes. Attackers often use this technique to dump credentials for lateral movement or privilege escalation.

prompts.prompt: Investigate the attempt to dump the SAM registry hive using `reg.exe` on host `{hostname}` at `{timestamp}`. The event was triggered by the process `{process_name}` with command line `{command_line}`. Identify the user (`{user_name}`) who executed the command. Determine if this is a legitimate administrative action or a malicious attempt to steal credentials. Provide a summary of the findings and recommend steps to contain the threat and reset credentials if necessary.

parameters.name: hostname
parameters.description: The hostname where the activity was detected.

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The name of the process that attempted to dump the SAM hive (e.g., reg.exe).

parameters.name: command_line
parameters.description: The full command line of the process.

parameters.name: user_name
parameters.description: The user account under which the process was executed.
